narrative:
Cols 63-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 878 registered voters, with 62.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
